description_fr: Federer, Nadal, Djokovic, Serena. Wimbledon, Roland-Garros, US Open, Australian Open.
description_en: Federer, Nadal, Djokovic, Serena. Wimbledon, Roland-Garros, US Open, Australian Open.

questions.question_fr: Combien de tournois du Grand Chelem y a-t-il par an ?
questions.question_en: How many Grand Slam tournaments per year?
questions.explanation_fr: 4 : Australian Open (janvier), Roland-Garros (mai-juin), Wimbledon (juin-juillet), US Open (août-septembre).
questions.explanation_en: 4: Australian Open (January), French Open (May-June), Wimbledon (June-July), US Open (Aug-Sept).

questions.question_fr: Sur quelle surface se joue Roland-Garros ?
questions.question_en: On which surface is Roland-Garros played?
questions.explanation_fr: Roland-Garros est le seul Grand Chelem joué sur terre battue (ocre).
questions.explanation_en: Roland-Garros is the only Grand Slam played on clay.

questions.question_fr: Rafael Nadal est surnommé le 'Roi de la Terre Battue'.
questions.question_en: Rafael Nadal is called the 'King of Clay'.
questions.explanation_fr: Nadal a remporté Roland-Garros 14 fois, record absolu sur terre battue.
questions.explanation_en: Nadal won Roland-Garros 14 times, absolute record on clay.

questions.question_fr: Combien de Grands Chelems Novak Djokovic a-t-il remportés (2025) ?
questions.question_en: How many Grand Slams has Novak Djokovic won (2025)?
questions.explanation_fr: Djokovic a 24 Grand Slams (record masculin) et compte plus à venir.
questions.explanation_en: Djokovic has 24 Grand Slams (men's record) with more potentially coming.

questions.question_fr: Quel est le tournoi le plus ancien des Grands Chelems ?
questions.question_en: Which is the oldest Grand Slam tournament?
questions.explanation_fr: Wimbledon existe depuis 1877. US Open 1881, Roland-Garros 1891, Australian Open 1905.
questions.explanation_en: Wimbledon since 1877. US Open 1881, Roland-Garros 1891, Australian Open 1905.

questions.question_fr: La joueuse la plus titrée en Grand Chelem en simple est Serena ___.
questions.question_en: The most-titled female Grand Slam player is Serena ___.
questions.explanation_fr: Serena Williams a 23 Grands Chelems en simple, record de l'ère Open.
questions.explanation_en: Serena Williams has 23 Grand Slams in singles, Open Era record.

questions.question_fr: Quelle joueuse australienne détient 24 Grands Chelems (record absolu) ?
questions.question_en: Which Australian holds 24 Grand Slams (absolute record)?
questions.explanation_fr: Margaret Court a 24 Grand Slams (incluant l'ère pré-Open), record absolu.
questions.explanation_en: Margaret Court has 24 Grand Slams (including pre-Open Era), absolute record.

questions.question_fr: Wimbledon impose le port du blanc.
questions.explanation_fr: Wimbledon est connu pour sa règle stricte du blanc immaculé.
questions.explanation_en: Wimbledon is known for its strict all-white dress code.

questions.question_fr: Combien de jeux faut-il gagner pour remporter un set classique ?
questions.question_en: How many games to win a standard set?
questions.explanation_fr: 6 jeux avec 2 jeux d'écart, sinon tie-break à 6-6.
questions.explanation_en: 6 games with 2-game lead, otherwise tiebreak at 6-6.

questions.question_fr: Quel est le surnom de Roger Federer ?
questions.explanation_fr: Federer = 'The Maestro' ou 'The Swiss Maestro'. Style élégant et fluide.
questions.explanation_en: Federer = 'The Maestro' or 'The Swiss Maestro'. Elegant and fluid style.

questions.question_fr: Le score 'égalité' en tennis se dit ___ en anglais.
questions.question_en: The 'égalité' tennis score is called ___ in English.
questions.explanation_fr: À 40-40, on dit 'deuce' en anglais. Le gagnant doit prendre 2 points d'avance.
questions.explanation_en: At 40-40, it's called 'deuce'. The winner must take 2 points lead.

questions.question_fr: Le tennis a été inventé en France au Moyen Âge.
questions.question_en: Tennis was invented in France in the Middle Ages.
questions.explanation_fr: Le 'jeu de paume' médiéval français est l'ancêtre du tennis moderne.
questions.explanation_en: Medieval French 'jeu de paume' is the ancestor of modern tennis.

questions.question_fr: Quel coup tennis frappe au-dessus de la tête, à pleine puissance ?
questions.question_en: Which tennis stroke is hit overhead, at full power?
questions.explanation_fr: Le smash est le coup d'attaque par-dessus la tête, sur balle haute.
questions.explanation_en: The smash is the overhead attacking stroke on a high ball.

questions.question_fr: Quel joueur tennis a été le plus longtemps n°1 mondial (semaines totales) ?
questions.question_en: Which player has been world #1 the most weeks?
questions.explanation_fr: Djokovic a passé 428+ semaines au n°1 mondial (record).
questions.explanation_en: Djokovic has spent 428+ weeks as world #1 (record).

questions.question_fr: Le trophée de Wimbledon hommes est appelé The ___ Cup.
questions.question_en: The Wimbledon men's trophy is called The ___ Cup.
questions.explanation_fr: The Gentlemen's Singles Challenge Cup, en argent doré.
questions.explanation_en: The Gentlemen's Singles Challenge Cup, gilded silver.
